story.iWant: to implement comprehensive quality monitoring framework
story.soThat: I can continuously assess the impact of optimizations on response quality và ensure safe deployment

subtasks.subtask: Test QualityMonitor class với sample metrics
Test metric tracking với sample data
Set up test execution on each deployment
Set quality thresholds for each metric
Add auto-rollback logic nếu quality thresholds breached
Test auto-rollback với quality degradation scenarios
Implement dashboard với quality metrics visualization

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Metrics tracked include: response_similarity, tool_success_rate, user_satisfaction, error_rate, response_completeness
Automated quality validation tests được integrated vào CI/CD pipeline
Alerting mechanisms được configured để notify nếu quality metrics drop below thresholds
Auto-rollback feature được integrated để revert to ORIGINAL mode nếu critical quality thresholds are breached
Quality dashboard được created để visualize quality metrics

doc.title: ChainLens AI Worker - Epic Breakdown: LLM Optimization
doc.snippet: Story 2.4 defines requirements for implementing quality monitoring framework. Enables safe deployment of all Phase 2 optimizations. Effort: 4 hours. Prerequisites: Stories 2.1, 2.2, 2.3, Story 1.4.

doc.title: ChainLens AI Worker - Master Optimization Plan v1.1
doc.section: Phase 2: Quality-Preserving Medium Optimizations - Task 2.4: Quality Monitoring Framework
doc.snippet: Quality monitoring framework tracks multiple quality dimensions: response_similarity, tool_success_rate, user_satisfaction, error_rate, response_completeness. Automated quality validation tests integrated into CI/CD. Alerting mechanisms configured. Auto-rollback feature reverts to ORIGINAL mode if quality thresholds breached.

doc.title: Research Prompt: System Prompt Optimization
doc.snippet: Quality monitoring framework requirements: comprehensive metrics tracking, automated quality validation, alerting mechanisms, auto-rollback feature, quality dashboard. Quality thresholds must be configurable. Auto-rollback reverts to baseline if quality degrades.

file.reason: New file to create. Implement QualityMonitor class với comprehensive metric tracking, automated quality validation, alerting mechanisms, auto-rollback feature, and quality dashboard integration.
Primary method to integrate quality monitoring. Need to track quality metrics during prompt building và LLM calls.
LLM API call handler. Need to integrate quality monitoring here to track response_similarity, error_rate, tool_success_rate.
Configuration management. Can add quality monitoring configuration (thresholds, alerting settings) here.
OptimizationConfig class (from Story 1.4). Need to integrate auto-rollback logic here to revert to ORIGINAL mode if quality thresholds breached.

constraint.description: Zero quality impact (monitoring only, no quality impact). Quality monitoring must be comprehensive và continuous. Quality thresholds must be configurable.
Dual-mode architecture: Auto-rollback to ORIGINAL mode if quality degrades. Feature flags allow switching and rollback. Quality monitoring enables safe deployment.
Comprehensive metrics: response_similarity, tool_success_rate, user_satisfaction, error_rate, response_completeness. Metrics must be tracked continuously và reported in real-time.
Automated quality validation tests must be integrated into CI/CD pipeline. Tests should run on each deployment. Quality thresholds must be enforced.
Alerting mechanisms must be configured to notify if quality metrics drop below thresholds. Alert recipients must be configurable. Alert delivery must be tested.
Auto-rollback feature must revert to ORIGINAL mode if critical quality thresholds are breached. Rollback events must be logged. Rollback mechanism must be tested.
Quality dashboard must visualize quality metrics in real-time. Dashboard should be accessible và user-friendly. Dashboard updates must be tested.

interface.name: QualityMonitor class
interface.signature: class QualityMonitor: def __init__(self, thresholds: Dict[str, float]): ... async def track_metric(self, metric_name: str, value: float): ... async def check_quality_thresholds(self) -> bool: ... async def trigger_rollback(self): ...

interface.name: OptimizationConfig class
interface.signature: class OptimizationConfig: OPTIMIZATION_MODE: OptimizationMode = OptimizationMode.ORIGINAL ... async def auto_rollback_if_needed(self, quality_monitor: QualityMonitor): ...

interface.name: make_llm_api_call()
interface.signature: async def make_llm_api_call(messages: List[Dict[str, Any]], model_name: str, ...) -> Union[Dict[str, Any], AsyncGenerator, ModelResponse]

tests.standards: Testing standards include: Quality validation (verify metrics are tracked correctly), Performance testing (monitoring overhead, dashboard performance), Integration testing (existing LLM calls, different models, agent configurations, CI/CD integration, alerting delivery, auto-rollback mechanism). Use comprehensive testing for all quality monitoring features.

test.idea: Unit test: Verify QualityMonitor class creation và initialization
Integration test: Test quality monitoring với monitoring infrastructure
Unit test: Verify metric tracking for all metrics (response_similarity, tool_success_rate, user_satisfaction, error_rate, response_completeness)
Integration test: Test metrics collection với sample data
Unit test: Verify quality validation test suite creation
Integration test: Test CI/CD pipeline integration với quality validation tests
Unit test: Verify alerting logic (threshold checking, alert generation)
Integration test: Test alert delivery với threshold breaches
Unit test: Verify auto-rollback logic (revert to ORIGINAL mode if quality thresholds breached)
Integration test: Test auto-rollback mechanism với quality degradation scenarios
Unit test: Verify quality dashboard components
Integration test: Test dashboard updates với real-time quality metrics
